description_long: This house is a modern, flat-roofed structure surrounded by a ring of tall palm trees, giving it a tropical and contemporary appearance. The building features clean, rectangular lines with large window openings and multiple entry points, suggesting an open-plan layout. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, likely finished in concrete or stucco, and the flat roof may serve as a terrace or functional outdoor space. The arrangement of windows is asymmetrical, with some large openings and others smaller, providing varied natural light. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back in some areas, creating a stepped profile. The main entryway is understated, with a small set of steps and a minimal overhang, blending seamlessly into the overall modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house surrounded by palm trees, featuring large windows and a minimalist entryway. The structure has clean lines and a light exterior finish, evoking a contemporary tropical style.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from a corner angle, highlighting the main entryway, a small set of steps, and the surrounding palm trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the asymmetrical window arrangement and the stepped upper story.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, revealing additional large window openings and a more private, enclosed section of the structure.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a frontal perspective, showcasing the main facade, the flat roof, and the dense arrangement of palm trees at the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with small steps and a flat overhang, integrated into the facade without decorative elements.
